title: K-200 GCS Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 GCS Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-483-A. Revision: A. Type: design-note. Author: Tyler Moss. Created: 2023-02-02. Last modified: 2023-12-22. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1146, P-1009, P-1047, P-1155.
